exit: P0=0 且 P1=1 ≤ 2 → 退出條件成立;三條全 accepted 落 v3,無殘留 Known Risk 化

useTraderSearch 補 refresh(refetch 包一層),對齊 CLAUDE.md §3 hook shape 契約
